turns.text: editmore_vertUserYou are analyzing a YouTube video transcript. Extract and structure the following information as valid JSON only (no markdown, no extra text).Return ONLY this JSON structure:{"summary": "2-3 sentence summary of the video content","keyPoints": ["point 1", "point 2", ...],"aiConcepts": ["AI concept 1", "AI concept 2", ...],"technicalDetails": ["tool/framework 1", "implementation detail", ...],"visualContextFlags": [{"timestamp": 120, "reason": "Code demo", "context": "Shows Python implementation"}]}If the video is not about AI/tech, set aiConcepts and technicalDetails to empty arrays but still extract keyPoints.TRANSCRIPT:AI never sleeps and this week has been absolutely insane we have two new open-source image generators we have an AI that can detect and edit the lighting color and material properties of videos we have two new free AI music generators open AI unleashes 03 mini their most performant model yet we have not one not two but three new AI models that even beat GPT and CLA and a lot more so let's Jump Right In First up this AI is super powerful it's called diffusion render from Nvidia and here's what it does it can take a video and estimate the geometry depth material properties and other features of objects in a video so for example if this is your input video it can calculate the depth of everything in the video it also calculates the normal which defines basically the surfaces of 3D objects in the video and this is really important for like simulating realistic lighting and shading and it also calculates the albo which is basically the base color of the object without any shading or lighting applied plus it also estimates the metallic properties of the objects or basically how reflective the object is and then it also estimates the roughness of the object so here are some more examples of this in action you can see on on the top left is the input video and it can estimate all these properties from the video here's yet another example even though the scene is pretty complex with a lot of objects it's able to handle this very well here's yet another example now because it can understand and estimate all these things from a video you can do some crazy things like manipulating the color the lighting or the reflectiveness of objects in videos so here are some examples of this in action how in insane is that here are some more examples of relighting so the input video is on the left but you can adjust the lighting however you want notice how the lighting and shadows are different for each of these four videos and if you compare this with existing relighting methods note how much more accurate and consistent this new tool is plus you can also change the roughness or reflective properties of any image or video notice how in the top row the ball and the horse are changing in terms of roughness and reflectiveness same with the objects on the bottom row and because it understands the geometry and lighting of a scene you can also insert any object into the video and it would align with the existing lighting so for example if we insert a Sync here it would look like this and then here let's insert a table and you can see it adds the table into the scene very seamlessly and for your information here's how it works it first takes in an input video and then runs it through a diffusion model in this inverse rendering stage it takes the video and estimates the color depth and other properties of the objects in it one attribute at a time then it's passed on to this forward rendering stage which takes those estimates and generates the new frame under different lighting conditions or whatever properties you specified to change and then it spits out the output video the cool thing about this AI is you can do all of this without needing any explicit 3D or lighting data unlike traditional methods it can just estimate and edit all of this with an input video anyways I'll link to this project page in the description below where you can read further and check out more demos next up we have a new free and open source image generator called Lumina image 2.0 this is a really highquality model given its size it's only 2 billion parameters whereas flux in comparison is 12 billion parameters which is six times larger now this Lumina image 2 supports up to 1024 resolution and it actually uses Gemma 2 as the text encoder and flux as the vae and here are some examples you can see it has absolutely no problem generating these realistic scenes it's also really good at generating text in images as you can see here and you can also enter prompts in different languages Plus in addition to realistic images it also can generate various Artistic Styles like this and here's a really cool feature you can generate multiple images in one image so let's say your prompt is generate a dual panel image where the lower half displays a canny edge map while the upper half retains the original image for direct visual comparison so this is what you get or here's another example generate a two- panel depiction of a human face transforming from a rough sketch in the left half to a hyperrealistic portrait in the right half and this is what we get now there are various hugging face spaces where you can use Lumina online for free so you just need to enter in a prompt but there are also advanced settings and here's another strength of Lumina image you can add in what is called a system prompt this is like an overarching prompt that describes the rules or the role of this AI so for example instead of this you can say you are a professional photog pH grapher and if you do that then all your outputs would be realistic professional photos and then here's where you enter in a negative prompt these are all the things you want to exclude from the image and then here's where you adjust the width and height here are some other settings which you might be familiar with if you've been doing image generation before anyways let's do a simple prompt like a portrait of a woman in the city and then click run all right so this is what we get this is indeed a portrait of a woman in the city now for the system prompt instead of saying you are a professional photographer let's write you are an impressionist painter and then press run and see what that gives us and here's our result so you can see how this new system prompt feature can be really useful now if you compare this new Lumin image with existing models of similar sizes like sdxl or stable Fusion 3 or even Dolly 3 or omn gen or nvidia's SAA note that for most of these benchmarks the highest score goes to Lumina image so it's a really impressive image generator given its small size anyways the models are out on hugging face already for you to download like I said this is completely free and open source I will link to this GitHub page in the description below for you to read further next up we have a new 3D model generator called diff Splat this can generate 3D models from just a text prompt or an image and the model is in the form of what is called a gausian Splat in the simplest sense this is basically a cloud of tiny colored points in 3D space and this thing is blazing fast so it only takes like 1 to 2 seconds to generate a model so here are various generations of turning a text description to a 3D model but like I said you can also upload an image and it would generate a 3D model from that so here are various examples notice even if your uploaded character is very detailed and complex it's able to handle it pretty well and it's also able to accurately estimate what the back of the character would look like so really quickly here's how it works it either takes in a text description or an image and then plugs it into this diffusion model this is basically an image generator like stable diffusion and flux and the nice thing is you can plug different image generator into this for example you can use sdxl or pixart or stable diffusion 3 just to name a few and then it goes through this latent decoder to generate the 3D model and this 3D rendering loss component basically provides more coherence across different views so that the 3D model remains consistent from different angles it's also very versatile so you can take an original object and then estimate the normal map of that object which is like estimating the surface of the object and then if you couple this with a new text description like a steampunk robot then it generates a new object based on this normal map or instead of estimating the surface you can also take an object and then extract the depth map from the object and then use that to generate some new 3D models based on a different text description or instead of depth map you can also extract the edge of an original object and then again using different text prompts you can generate new objects from that that aligns with this extracted Edge so a really powerful and versatile tool anyways at the top here they already have a GitHub repo so this includes all the instructions on how to install this and run it locally anyways I'll link to this main page in the description below for you to read further next up we finally have a decent opsource music generator it's called yeah and this can create full songs from Just a prompt you just need to input the lyrics and specify the genre like you would in udio or sunno and it would magically generate an entire song for you at least for a few minutes so here are some examples let's say for the genre you write inspiring female uplifting pop Airy vocal electronic bright vocal and then here are the lyrics well here's one sample generation from that staring at the sense colors the sky of you keep swearing can't deny I know you down and make me St but I'm here to man the heart I didn't break every word you take my the behind every dream you're a Chase I reach you by the life you can't F this and now I won't back down you know you can't deny it now I so that's one generation if you keep everything the same and generate it again here's another [Music] variation come beat the sky that's how you keep sweating can't to high I know I let you down I made mistakes but I'm here to man The I didn't break every you take I'm eyes you [Music] change so those are some examples of pop songs let's hear what rap sounds like here the genre is rap piano street tough piercing vocal hip-hop synthesizer clear vocal maale now it does sound like rap however note that it's kind of messing up the lyrics so it's skipping a lot of lines and it's jumping all over the place so anyways I will play this section for you and then show you the lyrics that were inputed this is my journey and I'm running this race he the Cs about a base said I couldn't do a said I'd never rise but now I'm sorbing high beaching for the skies lessons that I learned made me who I am standing T now I don't give a damn echoes in the alley music need to me watch is cish she be so me like me let USA and SK get all to ca first bir certain that b fing the from the world cing the CH do and the witch and on this fool man on my wing and from my near the end there before the chorus it just starts bluring out Rand lyrics that were not specified in the prompt but actually it's pretty cool to me how it's able to just continue wrapping on without any guidance it's like freestyling in a sense and then finally here's a jazz example so here the genre is female Blues Airy vocal bright vocal piano sad romantic guitar [Music] jazz sh T to fall up the ne echo through the hall bre in the silent I hear gentle voice guarding me back Homeward making my heart Rejoice don't let this moment they hold me close to with your he beside me things around can't the Dem don't want to let you go stay with me forever I just very nice very nice now it can even do extreme stuff like heavy metal so just a warning you might want to turn your speakers a bit down for this step back all night without a fight no SC get up with the first fight up P your hands be light might step back cuz I hold back F going going the on what thing so it has definitely no problem handling screaming and more extreme stuff like heavy metal and it can also sing in different languages so for example let's say you input these lyrics which include Japanese and English and also down here some Korean let's see what that gives [Music] us the only one I know know the only [Music] know love you do you want me and I want to be your number one come a littleit [Music] closer [Music] call notice near the end there it also did some like autotune synth voice effects which is really cool how insane is that all of this can be done from a free and open- Source AI that you can use right now and like I said you only need to specify the genre and the lyrics and it would magically come up with a full song For You including the verse and the lyrics anyways there's a GitHub Link at the top which contains all the instructions on how to download and use this for now note that it does require significant GPU memory so you could get away with 24 or even 6 16 GB at a bare minimum I would say but it is quite compute intensive that being said because this is completely open source and by the way it's under the Apache 2 license so you're free to pretty much do anything you want with it including using it for commercial purposes but anyways because this is open source I'm sure other users are really quickly going to release a quantized version of this which allows us to run it on Lower vram gpus now as I've shown you from the examples the quality is isn't great it's not as good as udio or sunno yet but this is completely free and open source let me know in the comments below if you want me to do a full installation tutorial on this anyways I will link to this main page in the description below for you to check out further in addition to Y we have yet another free AI music generator and this one is really damn good so it's called fuzz by refusion now refusion has been in the AI music generation space for a while now in fact I covered it like 2 years ago when it first came out well this week they released a new model called fuzz and here's a sample of what fuzz sounds [Music] like watching your face in theen everyone brings new te it [Music] the awesome thing is you can use it for free for unlimited times on their site right now as long as their gpus survive of course so you just need to go to refusion dcom which I'll link to in the description below here is where you can enter in the prompt and then press generate or in this compose section here's where it gives you more control and you can add in the lyrics here and also specify the sound that you want for now let me play you some of their top hits it sounds really [Music] good in the I PE passes Quick Glance back as the moment passes your t Life got me so damn Reckless leave these marks upon my necklace after the Bas drops when a crowd stops baby tell me what you [Music] need just another [Music] city say you to [Music] say so notice how much cleaner and 3D this sounds compared to Yu I mean this new refusion model is insanely good here's another example [Music] when I was down and now in the back streets of pain when I was down and out like a Blues in the rain but honey you came along I sweep sugar cane keep me [Music] higher baby true keep me higher down keep on taking me high so notice how the guitar sounds super realistic the voice is very high quality and dynamic this is just beautiful and another awesome feature about refusion is you can take any existing song and not only can you download the full song but you can also download the separate stems of the song and then remix them yourself really cool tool next up if you thought we were done talking about deep seek this week well they've actually released another Banger this time it's a multimodal AI model that can generate images it's called Janice Pro now should this be Janice or Janus cuz you know it's j and then anus anyways like with deep seek R1 this model is also free and open source but it's different from normal diffusion models like flux or stable diffusion this is actually a multimodal AI model that can handle both text and images now they've actually released four models of different parameter sizes so of course the biggest one is the best quality and the smallest one would be fastest and the least compute intensive and really quickly here are some example Generations from Janice you can see it can generate various styles from realistic to watercolor paintings to oil paintings to anime it can generate macro photography landscape photos it's really good here are some more examples it can generate pixel art kind of and it can generate these 2.5d digital art type photos now because this isn't just an image generator it can also understand text they compared this with various benchmarks on the left they compared it with several multimodal understanding benchmarks and you can see Janice Pro outperforms all the other models of similar parameter sizes and then on the right is the performance of Janice Pro in terms of instruction following benchmarks for image generation and you can see at least comparing it to stable diffusion 3 medium or Dolly 3 or sdxl Janice Pro is the best model now I would say their Generations are not as good as flux but keep in mind this is only 7 billion parameters whereas flux is 12 billion parameters and also this isn't a diffusion model this isn't just used for image generation it also has you know regular text and chat capabilities so the fact that they crammed everything into such a small model and it still outperformed other models in terms of multimodal understanding and image generation ation is just insanely impressive I mean my hat off to the Deep seek team they are releasing some incredible stuff now like I said this is completely free and open source they've already released the models for you to download and run locally plus they also have a free hugging face space for you to run this online next up there are some really cool updates in AI this week so one of my favorite AI video generators which I featured before called high laa Minimax has released a new director model this allows you to control the camera movements of your generation and this allows for really cool cinematic scenes like this so once you log into high law and you click create it's currently under the text to video Tab and down here is where you can choose this new director model so for example let's prompt it with a lone artist painting on an easel in a sunlit meadow and then over here we can click this camera icon which allows us to specify the camera movement of the scene so there are different options like sliding the camera left or right or panning the camera left or right or zooming in zooming out tilting up or down etc etc this allows you to really control the camera movement of your scene for us let's go with left circling this is basically an orbit shot so let's click this and note how it has now added these keywords to The Prompt so let's click generate and see what that gives us and here's my result this is indeed making the camera orbit to the left really impressive anyways I'm preparing a full review video on this so stay tuned for that in other AI video news Ali Baba has released their latest video generator called wanks is that how you pronounce it wanks anyways the generations from this model are actually really good it even beats some of the top paid models out there now you can currently use it for free on their interface called Quin chat so you just need to enter the prompt here and then click video generation here is where you can select the aspect ratio and then click generate definitely take advantage of this while it's still free now I already did a full review video on this where I compared wanks with other top video models out there so definitely check out this video if you haven't already thanks to AI portrait for sponsoring this video a good professional photo on your LinkedIn or business profile makes a huge difference now you could try to take them yourself or get a friend to do do so but most people aren't great at taking professional photos or you could hire a professional photo shoot but this costs over $200 on average plus you need to schedule a session and spend hours awkwardly posing at a camera and this brings us to AI portrait you can generate a portfolio of professional highquality photos in just minutes just upload one photo choose your gender and it would generate a portfolio of 50 professional head shot in various settings and it generates this within minutes so if you're looking for highquality professional photos without the hassle of a physical photo shoot AI portrait is your best bet check it out via the link in the description below now if you've been keeping up with AI news this week you've probably heard of deep seek this is the Chinese AI model that has taken over the Internet it's as good as open ai1 and it's completely open source and free to use now I've already done a few videos on deep seek so I won't repeat it here watch this video if you haven't already but in addition to deep seek there are actually a few other AI models that are also state-of-the-art so Alibaba recently released quen 2.5 Max which is their most advanced AI model to date this is a mixture of experts model so think of this as like a team of specialized AIS working together to help you solve a task so for example there could be one AI That's especially good at coding another one that's especially good at math another one that's especially good at writing and so on and so forth so if you group this team of AI agents together it's going to be more performant and you can see from these benchmark scores the red bar is quin 2.5 Max for most of these it beats other leading models out there like GPT 40 and Claude and deep seek version 3 note that all of these are non-thinking models this is deep seek V3 not R1 which is the thinking model that's making headlines but note that for most of these benchmarks it's as good or even better than the leading non-thinking models out there the awesome thing is you can use it right now for free also in this chat interface so at the top here is where you can select the model and you can see by default it has selected Quin 2.5 Max by the way you can also use this for web search for coding and also for generating images I go over all these functions in the latter half of this video plus another place where you can try this out especially if you want to do some coding is this free hugging face Space by a kque so over here is where you can select different models let's go with quen coder and then here is where you can select quen 2.5 Max this is just the date so this is the most recent model and then let's actually input a really tricky prompt I'm going to put write a script for three bouncing yellow balls Within in a sphere make sure to handle Collision detection properly make the sphere slowly rotate make sure balls stay within the sphere implement it in p5.js let's click generate and see what that gives us so the awesome thing about this free platform called any chat is not only does it show you the code in this left panel but then it outputs the code for you to view in real time on the right and here we go and it completely nailed this just the first time zero shot how insane is that this just shows you how good quen 2.5 Pro is in terms of coding now note that while you can use quen 2.5 Max for free on this platform it's currently not open source so developers can currently access it via alibaba's Cloud API that being said several other Quin models have also been released this week and these are completely free and open source and they also Crush various benchmark scores so here we have Quin 2.5 VL I would argue this is even more useful than Quin 2.5 Max because this has Vision capabilities in other words it can analyze images and even hourlong videos so here are some examples if you prompt it with what are these attractions give me their names in Chinese and English it indeed Nails everything and look at this this is super impressive if you ask it what are these Birds please give their names in Chinese and English English it also Nails everything now species identification has been really hard for previous AI Vision models so this is really impressive same with identifying cars Quin 2.5 VL also gets the answers for all of these correctly same with identifying famous people so if you ask it who are these in the picture please give their names in Chinese and English again it is able to answer this 100% correctly here's another impressive example if you ask basket recognize all texts in the image output in lines note that again it's able to detect the text and output it for you correctly here's another impressive example spot all the text in the image with line level and output in Json format so here's a receipt note that it's detecting everything and then outputting it in Json format you can also convert something into HTML so if you input this image and then you prompt it to generate HTML with image caption here is what you get and because of this Vision capability because it can analyze images and video this means you can also use it as an AI agent which interprets your screen and determines what to do next so here are some examples here the user is getting this AI agent powered by Quin 2.5 VL to book a one-way ticket from chonging to Bing and that's exactly what it's doing it's analyzing the d

more_vertModel Thoughts Synthesizing Tech NewsI've begun synthesizing the tech news roundup. I'm extracting key points, and identifying relevant AI concepts and technical details as JSON. Visual context flags will also be captured. The process is now focusing on the overall summary, and identifying the main points.Reviewing New ModelsI'm now diving into the latest AI models. I'm focusing on their capabilities. Notably, I've noted Nvidia's Diffusion Render for video-based 3D scene creation, and Lumina Image 2.0, a smaller open-source image generator. DiffSplat is a super fast 3D model generator, using Gaussian Splatting. Further, Yu is open-source music generator while Fuzz is another high-quality AI music model. Janice Pro is a new multimodal AI, while High-La/Minimax is an AI video control tool. Finally, WanX is a new video generator.Examining New AII've zeroed in on the impressive Qwen 2.5 Max and VL models from Alibaba. The benchmarks are compelling, with the Max model outperforming GPT-4o and Claude, while the VL model excels in OCR and vision tasks. This aligns with other recent advances, like Nvidia's Diffusion Render for video editing, and open-source models like Lumina 2.0 and DeepSeek's Janice Pro. The potential of Yu and Fuzz in music generation is also notable.Deep Diving AI AdvancementsI'm now zeroing in on Qwen 2.5's performance, particularly Max and VL. Both are state-of-the-art across key benchmarks. I'm noting the progress in multimodal AI, with DeepSeek Janice Pro and its image understanding and generation capabilities. I'm also capturing details on new video tools, WanX and the High-La Director model. I'm focusing on the integration of diffusion models and Gaussian Splatting, and their relevance to new models.Analyzing Model DemosI'm now analyzing recent demos. I've focused on video attribute estimation, and seeing how depth, normals, albedo, and metallic properties can be extracted from raw video. I then observed the Lumina Image 2.0 interface on Hugging Face, including its system prompts. Finally, I've checked out DiffSplat in action, creating 3D Gaussian Splats from 2D images, and Qwen 2.5 Max's code generation of physics sims. I saw Qwen 2.5 VL extract text from a receipt, and identify a bird. Expand to view model thoughts  chevron_right

editmore_vert{"summary": "This video provides a comprehensive roundup of a major week in AI, highlighting breakthroughs in video relighting, 3D generation, and multimodal models. It features high-performance releases from Nvidia, Alibaba, and DeepSeek, alongside new open-source tools for high-quality music and image generation.","keyPoints": ["Nvidia's Diffusion Render enables advanced video editing by estimating geometry, lighting, and material properties like roughness and metallicity.","Lumina Image 2.0 and DeepSeek's Janice Pro provide powerful, smaller-parameter open-source alternatives to models like Flux and Dall-E 3.","New AI music generators Yu and Fuzz (Refusion) offer high-quality, full-song generation with Yu being fully open-source under Apache 2.","Alibaba's Qwen 2.5 Max and VL models demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in coding, vision analysis, and reasoning benchmarks.","Video generation tools are gaining better control features, such as the High-La Minimax Director model for precise camera movements."],"aiConcepts": ["Inverse Rendering","Gaussian Splatting","Multimodal AI","Mixture of Experts (MoE)","Vision-Language Models (VLM)","Diffusion Models","Latent Decoders","Zero-shot Generation","System Prompts"],"technicalDetails": ["Nvidia Diffusion Render","Lumina Image 2.0 (Gemma 2 text encoder, Flux VAE)","DiffSplat (3D Gaussian Splatting)","Yu (Apache 2.0 license)","DeepSeek Janice Pro (7B parameters)","Qwen 2.5 Max","Qwen 2.5 VL","High-La Minimax Director model","Alibaba WanX"],"visualContextFlags": [{"timestamp": 12, "reason": "Video attribute estimation demo", "context": "Shows extraction of depth, normals, and albedo from a standard input video."},{"timestamp": 115, "reason": "UI and feature demonstration", "context": "Displays the Lumina Image 2.0 interface on Hugging Face, highlighting system prompt settings."},{"timestamp": 232, "reason": "3D generation visualization", "context": "Shows text-to-3D generation using DiffSplat and its underlying architecture."},{"timestamp": 665, "reason": "Live code generation demo", "context": "Demonstrates Qwen 2.5 Max successfully writing p5.js code for a complex physics simulation."},{"timestamp": 751, "reason": "Vision capabilities showcase", "context": "Visualizes Qwen 2.5 VL identifying bird species and converting receipt images into JSON data."}]}thumb_upthumb_down
